name: Miki Okudera
description: A university student, one of Taki's friends and his co-worker at the Italian restaurant "Il Giardino delle Parole". She is a beautiful and fashionable college girl who is popular with the male waiters. She develops closer feelings for Taki when Mitsuha inhabits his body. She is a smoker, which Tsukasa discovers when they spend a night together while accompanying Taki on his search for Mitsuha. .~!At the end of Your Name, Okudera is shown to be wearing a wedding ring although it is never stated who she marries in the film. In an interview, however, Makoto Shinkai revealed that she was engaged with Tsukasa Fujii, as he was also shown with a wedding ring prior to Taki and Okudera's exchange at the end of the film!~
